rule_metadata.name: RUAG_Tavdig_Malformed_Executable
rule_metadata.description: Detects an embedded executable with a malformed header - known from Tavdig malware
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule RUAG_Tavdig_Malformed_Executable
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an embedded executable with a malformed header - known from Tavdig malware"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/N5MEj0"
		score = 60

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and uint32( uint32( 0x3C ) ) == 0x0000AD0B
}

rule_metadata.name: RUAG_Bot_Config_File
rule_metadata.description: Detects a specific config file used by malware in RUAG APT case
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule RUAG_Bot_Config_File
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a specific config file used by malware in RUAG APT case"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/N5MEj0"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$s1 = "[CONFIG]" ascii
		$s2 = "name = " ascii
		$s3 = "exe = cmd.exe" ascii

	condition:
		$s1 at 0 and $s2 and $s3 and filesize < 160
}

rule_metadata.name: RUAG_Cobra_Malware
rule_metadata.description: Detects a malware mentioned in the RUAG Case called Carbon/Cobra
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule RUAG_Cobra_Malware
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a malware mentioned in the RUAG Case called Carbon/Cobra"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/N5MEj0"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$s1 = "\\Cobra\\Release\\Cobra.pdb" ascii

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and $s1
}

rule_metadata.name: RUAG_Cobra_Config_File
rule_metadata.description: Detects a config text file used by malware Cobra in RUAG case
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule RUAG_Cobra_Config_File
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a config text file used by malware Cobra in RUAG case"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/N5MEj0"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$h1 = "[NAME]" ascii
		$s1 = "object_id=" ascii
		$s2 = "[TIME]" ascii fullword
		$s3 = "lastconnect" ascii
		$s4 = "[CW_LOCAL]" ascii fullword
		$s5 = "system_pipe" ascii
		$s6 = "user_pipe" ascii
		$s7 = "[TRANSPORT]" ascii
		$s8 = "run_task_system" ascii
		$s9 = "[WORKDATA]" ascii
		$s10 = "address1" ascii

	condition:
		$h1 at 0 and 8 of ( $s* ) and filesize < 5KB
}

rule_metadata.name: RUAG_Exfil_Config_File
rule_metadata.description: Detects a config text file used in data exfiltration in RUAG case
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule RUAG_Exfil_Config_File
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a config text file used in data exfiltration in RUAG case"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/N5MEj0"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$h1 = "[TRANSPORT]" ascii
		$s1 = "system_pipe" ascii
		$s2 = "spstatus" ascii
		$s3 = "adaptable" ascii
		$s4 = "post_frag" ascii
		$s5 = "pfsgrowperiod" ascii

	condition:
		$h1 at 0 and all of ( $s* ) and filesize < 1KB
}
